interactions.summary: The host pushes the religion-of-science idea; Jiang says COVID debate was suppressed, then claims COVID was a bioweapon or gain-of-function product tied to U.S. military subcontracting in China.
interactions.speaker_attribution: Interview exchange: SPEAKER_00 is host Jack Neel or ad read; SPEAKER_01 is Jiang unless noted.

speaker_notes.note: Diarization is consistent enough for this packet: SPEAKER_00 carries host questions, intro, outro, or sponsor reads; SPEAKER_01 carries Jiang answers. Sponsor ad segments are not Jiang claims.

claims.claim: Jiang defines science-as-religion as truth claims without debate: during COVID, dissent was shut down and ostracized instead of explored.
Jiang claims COVID was a bioweapon or gain-of-function product supported by the U.S. military and subcontracted to China after Obama-era restrictions.

signature_moments.moment: Science becomes religion when debate disappears.
signature_moments.source_phrase: How much debate happened during the COVID epidemic? None.
signature_moments.why_it_matters: This is his cleanest definition of the science-faith inversion.

signature_moments.moment: The alleged U.S.-China bioweapon link becomes proof the world does not work like official enemy stories.
signature_moments.source_phrase: the world probably doesn't work the way you think it does
signature_moments.why_it_matters: It ties conspiracy diagnosis to geopolitical theater.

glossary_terms.definition_or_usage: Research Jiang says made the virus mutate unusually fast and was subcontracted because of U.S. restrictions.
A possible vaccine side effect Jiang uses as an example of insufficient questioning after mass rollout.

chronology_notes.note: The COVID claims are retrospective claims made from 2026, not contemporary 2020-2021 notes.

uncertainty_notes.note: Several claims in this packet are explicitly speculative or conspiratorial in Jiang's framing; preserve attribution to this interview rather than promoting them as established fact.
